name: David Chiang
headline: 把複雜的技術債，轉化為看得見的商業價值
headlineEn: Turn technical complexity into visible business value
subHeadline: 系統越長越大，資料卻四分五裂？
subHeadlineEn: I am a CTO-level advisor with multinational and high-scale delivery experience, helping companies validate technical direction, rebuild systems and data flows, and step in hands-on when execution matters.
bio: 技術團隊交出一疊厚厚的架構文件，你卻看不出來到底能不能真正落地、能不能支撐未來的業務成長？
我是具備跨國企業與億級流量實戰經驗的 CTO 級顧問。過去十年，我不只畫藍圖，更親自帶隊把複雜系統從混亂帶向高效，讓技術真正成為商業的加速器，而非包袱。
我專注幫你做到三件事：
看清技術路線的真實風險與機會
重整破碎的資料流與系統架構
必要時直接進場，帶領團隊把事情做對、做完
代表經歷：
企業級電商架構：率領 70 人研發團隊，為全球最大健康與美容零售商打造具備高併發與智慧能力的 SAP eCommerce 平台
跨系統整合：為全球知名消費性電子品牌串接多通路客服、Salesforce、HubSpot、RingCentral 與 RMA 退換貨流程，大幅提升運營效率
媒體科技：主導高併發社群平台與生成式內容系統的架構優化，確保穩定性與擴展性
特別適合以下情境：
準備評估技術團隊的提案，卻需要第二意見把關
系統已出現明顯瓶頸，擔心繼續投資會踩雷
創投機構或投資人需要專業技術盡職調查（Tech Due Diligence），判斷標的物的技術可信度與潛在風險
合作方式：
正職｜兼職｜專案顧問（可依專案規模與深度彈性調整）
謝絕博弈、加密貨幣與交易所相關項目。
→ github 大量個人開源專案 超過 111 組
→ chrome extension 超過 9 組
→ 社群瀏覽量 單月 1.10M+ (threads)
bioEn: When systems keep growing, data becomes fragmented, and architecture documents look impressive but unclear in real execution, I help leadership make the right technical call.
I focus on three outcomes: exposing real technical risks and opportunities, rebuilding broken data and system flows, and stepping in directly when the team needs execution leadership.
Enterprise e-commerce: led a 70-person engineering team to build a high-concurrency, intelligence-enabled SAP eCommerce platform for the world's largest health and beauty retailer.
Cross-system integration: connected customer support, Salesforce, HubSpot, RingCentral, and RMA workflows for a major global consumer electronics brand, significantly improving operations.
Media technology: led architecture optimization for high-concurrency community platforms and generative content systems to improve stability and scalability.
Best fit when you need a second opinion on technical proposals, are worried about scaling bottlenecks, or require technical due diligence before investment.
[ Available for full-time, part-time, or project advisory work. No gambling, crypto, or exchanges. ]
